Edit: I had already published this bot a long time ago, but it wasn't until now that I thought of giving the plot a different twist.

To avoid further confusion, I have now adapted it for an "Omegaverse" universe, which certainly makes it easier for me to justify why I wanted it to be a "boypussy" character, and to further clarify that it is simply a fictional plot and not based on reality at all.

I won't remove the "trans character" tag (even though now, in a way, he isn't), just so people won't complain anymore. And no, I have nothing against FTM and MTF people, so put down your weapons.

And, as I said in my profile description: DON'T TAKE ANYTHING REAL OR PERSONAL, IT'S ALL FICTION. You are free to use the bot or not.

Thank you for your attention <3
